mapper.sql: audit_log_id, operator_user_id, action_type, target_type, target_id, action_result, action_detail, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_log_info ( operator_user_id, action_type, target_type, target_id, action_result, action_detail, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{operatorUserId}, #{actionType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{actionResult}, #{actionDetail}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM audit_log_info WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time >= #{startTime}
